verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jesus, Lover of my soul, Jesus, I will never let you go You've taken me from the miry clay You've set my feet upon the Rock, and now I know.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I love you, I need you, Though my world may fall, I' ll never let you go My Saviour, my closest friend, I will worship you until the very end.
